sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19382" key="ba=ros2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾶρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾶρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n19382.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spice,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:4:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
